summary: An edited video on the arrest of Salvadoran national Carlos Ramirez. It intercuts handheld arrest footage of camo-clad 'POLICE FEDERAL AGENT' officers detaining a man at a vehicle with a graphic centerpiece: a desaturated grayscale background, an animated targeting reticle locking onto the man, and red text naming him and listing his charges. The audio is a music bed plus shouted 'hands on the floor'. The video closes on the DHS seal.

script.scene: Handheld shot: a man in a black 'Hurley' cap is detained beside a gray pickup truck by camo-clad agents on a sunny suburban street; shouted audio 'hands on the floor.'
Graphic frame: desaturated grayscale of the cap-wearing man (arms restrained behind back) with an animated blue targeting reticle on him and red text beginning 'CARLOS RAMIREZ...'

Graphic resolves: red name banner 'CARLOS RAMIREZ GUZMAN' with caption 'CHARGED WITH AGGRAVATED ASSAULT WITH A DEADLY WEAPON ON A LAW ENFORCEMENT OFFICER AND DOMESTIC BATTERY' over the grayscale arrest image.
Color handheld footage: an officer in a 'POLICE FEDERAL AGENT' vest and camo-clad agents walk the cuffed man (face blurred) past an SUV toward a brick building.
Light-gray end card with the U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal.

notable_text: CHARGED WITH AGGRAVATED ASSAULT WITH A DEADLY WEAPON ON A LAW ENFORCEMENT OFFICER AND DOMESTIC BATTERY
